proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher age_years is associated with longer pfs_months (positive correlation).
Higher ecog_ps is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative association).
Patients with stage_iv=1 have shorter pfs_months than patients with stage_iv=0.
Patients with has_brain_mets=1 have shorter pfs_months than patients without brain metastases.

analyses.code:
from scipy.stats import spearmanr
spearmanr(df.age_years, df.pfs_months)
analyses.result_summary: Spearman correlation rho=+0.726 between age_years and pfs_months (very strong positive relationship). Quartile means: Q1(30-58y)=2.50, Q4(72-90y)=6.96.
Spearman rho=-0.334. Mean PFS by ECOG: 0=5.64, 1=4.44, 2=3.29 months.
Mean PFS stage_iv=1 is 3.62 vs 5.15 in stage_iv=0; difference -1.54 months (t-test).
Mean PFS has_brain_mets=1 is 3.75 vs 4.80 in those without; difference -1.05 months.

proposed_hypotheses.text: er_positive=1 is associated with longer pfs_months than er_positive=0 (positive prognostic).
her2_positive=1 is associated with shorter pfs_months than her2_positive=0 (negative prognostic).
pik3ca_mutation=1 is associated with shorter pfs_months than pik3ca_mutation=0.
pr_positive=1 is associated with longer pfs_months than pr_positive=0.
her2_low=1 is associated with longer pfs_months than her2_low=0.

analyses.result_summary: ER+ mean PFS 4.87 vs ER- 4.30 months; diff +0.57.
HER2+ mean PFS 4.32 vs HER2- 4.78 months; diff -0.46.
PIK3CA-mut mean PFS 4.33 vs PIK3CA-wt 4.89 months; diff -0.56.
PR+ mean PFS 4.82 vs PR- 4.46 months; diff +0.36.
her2_low+ mean PFS 4.77 vs her2_low- 4.65 months; diff +0.11. Likely confounded by HER2 status.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher albumin_g_dl is associated with longer pfs_months.
Higher weight_loss_pct_6mo is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher ki67_pct is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher ldh_u_l is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Other lab values (hemoglobin, AST, ALT, bilirubin, creatinine, BUN, sodium, potassium, calcium, CRP, NLR, alkaline phosphatase, tumor_size_cm) are not strongly associated with pfs_months.
node_positive, postmenopausal, sex_female, brca1_mutation, brca2_mutation are not associated with pfs_months.

analyses.code: for c in continuous_features: spearmanr(df[c], df.pfs_months)
analyses.result_summary: albumin rho=+0.10 (p=1.4e-115); weight_loss rho=-0.12 (p=4.8e-149); ki67_pct rho=-0.08 (p=8.1e-77); ldh rho=-0.013 (p=4.6e-3). All others |rho|<0.013 with p>0.01 (no meaningful signal).
node_positive diff=-0.02 p=0.29; postmenopausal diff=-0.02 p=0.31; sex_female diff=-0.01 p=0.56; brca1 diff=-0.02 p=0.73; brca2 diff=-0.13 p=0.08. None significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_palbociclib=1 is associated with longer pfs_months than =0 in the unadjusted comparison.
treatment_tamoxifen=1 is associated with longer pfs_months than =0 (unadjusted).
treatment_trastuzumab=1 is associated with longer pfs_months than =0 (unadjusted).
treatment_olaparib=1 is associated with longer pfs_months than =0 (unadjusted).
treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan=1 is associated with longer pfs_months than =0 (unadjusted).
treatment_pembrolizumab=1 is associated with longer pfs_months than =0 (unadjusted).

analyses.result_summary: Palbociclib mean PFS 5.41 vs 4.31 control; diff +1.10 months. Strong positive main effect.
Tamoxifen mean PFS 4.72 vs 4.68 control; diff +0.04 months.
Trastuzumab mean PFS 4.65 vs 4.71 control; diff -0.06 months.
Olaparib mean PFS 4.66 vs 4.70 control; diff -0.04 months.
Sacituzumab mean PFS 4.69 vs 4.69 control; diff -0.01 months.
Pembrolizumab mean PFS 4.63 vs 4.70 control; diff -0.07 months.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment for prognostic features, treatment_palbociclib retains a substantial positive effect on pfs_months.
After adjustment, treatment_tamoxifen, _trastuzumab, _olaparib, and _pembrolizumab show no overall main effect on pfs_months.
After adjustment, treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan shows a small positive main effect on pfs_months.

analyses.code: OLS pfs_months ~ all treatments + age + ecog + stage_iv + brain_mets + er + pr + her2 + her2_low + brca + pik3ca + ki67 + albumin + ldh + weight_loss + tumor_size + labs
analyses.result_summary: Palbociclib beta=+1.10 p≈0; sacituzumab beta=+0.034 p=0.049; tamoxifen beta=-0.008 p=0.48; trastuzumab beta=-0.009 p=0.47; olaparib beta=-0.026 p=0.12; pembrolizumab beta=-0.020 p=0.17. Model R^2=0.79.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The palbociclib effect on pfs_months is positively modified by er_positive (larger benefit in ER+).
The palbociclib effect on pfs_months is negatively modified by her2_positive (no/negative benefit in HER2+).
The palbociclib effect on pfs_months is negatively modified by pik3ca_mutation (no benefit in PIK3CA-mut).

analyses.result_summary: Palbo x ER+ interaction beta=+1.56 (p≈0). Stratified palbo benefit: ER+=+1.92 mo, ER-=-0.0 mo.
Palbo x HER2+ interaction beta=-1.34 (p≈0). Stratified palbo benefit in ER+: HER2-=+1.92 mo, HER2+=+0.02 mo.
Palbo x PIK3CA-mut interaction beta=-1.67 (p≈0). Within ER+/HER2-: PIK3CA-wt palbo benefit +2.38 mo; PIK3CA-mut +0.04 mo.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Palbociclib provides large PFS benefit (>2 months) only in ER+/HER2-/PIK3CA-wt patients; no benefit elsewhere.

analyses.result_summary: Triple-marker subgroup ER+/HER2-/PIK3CA-wt (n=18681): palbo benefit +2.91 mo (palbo PFS 7.21 vs 4.30). Complement (n=31319): palbo benefit +0.003 mo. Adjusted beta in subgroup +2.92 (p≈0).

proposed_hypotheses.text: trastuzumab effect on pfs_months is positively modified by her2_positive (benefit concentrated in HER2+).
olaparib effect on pfs_months is positively modified by brca1_mutation or brca2_mutation.
pembrolizumab effect on pfs_months is positively modified by triple-negative status (er-, pr-, her2-).
tamoxifen effect on pfs_months is positively modified by er_positive.
sacituzumab govitecan effect on pfs_months is positively modified by her2_low.

analyses.result_summary: HER2+ trastuzumab benefit -0.08 mo (p=NS); HER2- benefit -0.05 mo. Adjusted in HER2+: beta=+0.001 p=0.83. No interaction or benefit.

analyses.code: Stratified analysis by BRCA mutation status
analyses.result_summary: BRCA-any (n=2499) olaparib unadjusted benefit +0.35 mo, but adjusted beta=+0.001, p=0.99. Olaparib x BRCA interaction beta=-0.003 p=0.97. No real effect.
TNBC (n=10496) pembrolizumab unadjusted benefit +0.07 mo. Adjusted beta=+0.008 p=0.13. Pembro x TNBC interaction p=0.35. No clear benefit.
ER+ tamoxifen unadjusted benefit +0.02 mo; ER- +0.08 mo. Adjusted in ER+: beta=+0.003 p=0.83. Tam x ER interaction p=0.21. No benefit.
her2_low+ (n=18543) sacituzumab benefit -0.03 mo; her2_low- benefit +0.01 mo. No interaction with her2_low.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among the six therapies, only palbociclib has a clinically meaningful main effect; trastuzumab, tamoxifen, olaparib, pembrolizumab show no benefit even in their canonical molecular subgroups.

analyses.code: Adjusted regressions in each canonical subgroup
analyses.result_summary: Trastuzumab in HER2+ (n=9060): beta=+0.001 p=0.83. Olaparib in BRCA1/2+ (n=2499): beta=-0.005 p=0.95. Pembrolizumab in TNBC (n=10496): beta=+0.008 p=0.13. Tamoxifen in ER+ (n=34886): beta=+0.003 p=0.83. None significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within the ER+/HER2-/PIK3CA-wt palbociclib responder subgroup, the benefit is further modified by ki67_pct (smaller benefit in high ki67).

analyses.code: Stratified palbo benefit by ki67 quartile within ER+/HER2-/PIK3CA-wt
analyses.result_summary: Palbo benefit by ki67 quartile (median ki67): Q0(5.5)=+4.93, Q1(9.7)=+4.97, Q2(15.2)=+1.72, Q3(26.8)=-0.05. Continuous palbo x ki67 interaction within subgroup: beta=-0.138 per percent ki67 (p≈0). Effect drops sharply above ki67~15.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The complete palbociclib responder subgroup is ER+/HER2-/PIK3CA-wt/ki67<15; in this group palbociclib provides ~+4.7 mo PFS benefit, with ~0 benefit elsewhere.

analyses.code: OLS in full subgroup vs complement
analyses.result_summary: Subgroup ER+/HER2-/PIK3CA-wt/ki67<15 (n=11490): palbo PFS 8.97 vs 4.29 control, adjusted beta=+4.71, p≈0. Complement (n=38510): adjusted palbo beta=-0.0004, p=0.86. Effect entirely localized to subgroup.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Sacituzumab govitecan effect is positively modified by has_brain_mets (benefit only in patients with brain metastases).

analyses.result_summary: Sacituzumab x has_brain_mets interaction beta=+0.238, p=2.99e-5. Stratified: brain_mets+ benefit +0.16 mo unadjusted (+0.25 adjusted, p=4.99e-6); brain_mets- benefit -0.03 mo.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within the brain-metastases subgroup, sacituzumab benefit is further concentrated in ER+/HER2-/PIK3CA-wt/low-ki67 patients.
Within brain mets, the sacituzumab benefit is independent of ER status (i.e., has_brain_mets alone defines the subgroup).

analyses.code: Stratified sacituzumab benefit within brain mets by joint biomarkers
analyses.result_summary: Within brain mets, sac benefit unadjusted: ER+=+0.32, ER-=-0.07; PR+=+0.36, PR-=-0.04; HER2-=+0.20, HER2+=-0.02; PIK3CA-wt=+0.25, PIK3CA-mut=+0.04; ki67_low=+0.43, ki67_high=-0.08. Suggests amplification by ER+/PR+/HER2-/PIK3CA-wt/low-ki67, but in subgroup ER+/HER2-/PIK3CA-wt/ki67<15+brain_mets (n=1203) sac benefit +0.76 mo unadjusted.

Three-way sac x bm x er interaction beta=+0.034, p=0.78 (NOT significant). The two-way sac x bm interaction beta=+0.213, p=0.032. ER status does not significantly modify the bm-localized effect; simplest definition is has_brain_mets alone.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Comprehensive treatment-by-feature interaction screen across binary and median-split continuous features identifies palbo and sacituzumab as the only treatments with strong heterogeneity signals.

analyses.code: OLS pfs_months with treatment x feature interaction terms across 6 treatments x 22 features
analyses.result_summary: Top interactions (smallest p): palbociclib x er_positive (+1.56, p≈0), palbociclib x ki67_high (-1.57, p≈0), palbociclib x pik3ca_mutation (-1.67, p≈0), palbociclib x her2_positive (-1.34, p≈0), palbociclib x pr_positive (+1.03, p≈0), palbociclib x her2_low (+0.38, p=3e-67). Then sacituzumab x has_brain_mets (+0.24, p=2.5e-5). All other treatment x feature interactions p>0.001 and effect sizes <|0.1|.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Adjusted multivariable model: pfs_months = age (+), ecog (-), stage_iv (-), has_brain_mets (-), er+ (+), her2+ (-), pik3ca-mut (-), ki67 (-), albumin (+), ldh (-), weight_loss (-), with palbociclib the main treatment with positive effect.

analyses.result_summary: Significant coefficients (R^2=0.79): age +0.176/y, ecog -1.17/level, stage_iv -1.55, brain_mets -0.98, er+ +0.53, her2+ -0.47, pik3ca-mut -0.58, ki67 -0.019/%, albumin +0.48/g/dL, ldh -0.0005/U/L, weight_loss -0.077/%; brca1 -0.07 (marginal). Treatments: palbociclib +1.10, sacituzumab +0.034 (p=0.05); other treatments NS.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Older age_years is a strong positive prognostic factor for pfs_months even after adjustment.

node_positive, postmenopausal, sex_female, brca1, brca2, tumor_size_cm, hemoglobin, AST, ALT, bilirubin, creatinine, BUN, sodium, potassium, calcium, CRP, NLR, alkaline phosphatase have null or trivial effects on pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted age beta=+0.176/y (p≈0). Mean PFS Q1 age 30-58y: 2.50 mo; Q4 72-90y: 6.96 mo. Counterintuitive sign suggests dataset features prognostic skew with age (e.g., older=more indolent disease in this cohort).

node_positive beta=-0.018 p=0.08; brca1 beta=-0.068 p=0.04 (small); brca2 beta=-0.043 p=0.20; tumor_size beta=+0.001 p=0.65; hemoglobin beta=+0.0002 p=0.96; other labs all p>0.1. Effects are null or noise-level.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Adjusted treatment effect of trastuzumab in HER2+ patients is null.
Adjusted treatment effect of olaparib in BRCA-mutated patients is null.
Adjusted treatment effect of pembrolizumab in TNBC patients is null.
Adjusted treatment effect of tamoxifen in ER+ patients is null.

analyses.result_summary: Trastuzumab in HER2+ beta=+0.001 p=0.83. Olaparib in BRCA+ beta=-0.005 p=0.95. Pembro in TNBC beta=+0.008 p=0.13. Tamoxifen in ER+ beta=+0.003 p=0.83. All null.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within the palbociclib responder subgroup ER+/HER2-/PIK3CA-wt/ki67<15, the magnitude of the palbociclib benefit is independent of stage_iv, brain mets, postmenopausal status, PR, her2_low, and BRCA mutations.

analyses.code: Stratified palbo benefit within subgroup by these features
analyses.result_summary: Within ER+/HER2-/PIK3CA-wt subgroup, palbo benefit by stratifier: stage_iv 0/1: +2.94/+2.83; brain_mets 0/1: +2.91/+2.78; postmenopausal 0/1: +3.04/+2.82; pr_positive 0/1: +2.69/+2.95; her2_low 0/1: +2.90/+2.92; brca1 0/1: +2.92/+2.57; brca2 0/1: +2.92/+2.53. Effect uniform within subgroup.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Sacituzumab govitecan benefit is concentrated in patients with brain metastases; outside brain mets the effect is essentially zero.
Within brain mets the sacituzumab benefit is amplified in ER+/HER2-/low-ki67 patients but the simplest defensible subgroup is has_brain_mets=1 alone.

analyses.result_summary: has_brain_mets=1 (n=5090): adjusted sac beta=+0.244 p=5.2e-6 (mean PFS sac 3.90 vs control 3.74). has_brain_mets=0 (n=44910): unadjusted sac benefit -0.03 mo. Effect is localized.

analyses.code: Three-way interaction model and subgroup tests
analyses.result_summary: Within brain mets+ER+ (n=3581): adjusted sac beta=+0.230 p=1.4e-3. Within brain mets+ER+/HER2-/PIK3CA-wt/ki67<15 (n=1203): unadjusted sac benefit +0.76 mo, adjusted +0.13 (p=0.26, but n is small). 3-way sac*bm*er interaction NS. Brain mets is the simplest sufficient definition.

proposed_hypotheses.text: When combining all palbociclib subgroup-defining variables, the responder definition is: er_positive=1 AND her2_positive=0 AND pik3ca_mutation=0 AND ki67_pct<15. Outside this definition palbociclib has no benefit.

analyses.result_summary: Subgroup (n=11490): adjusted palbo beta=+4.71 (p≈0). Complement (n=38510): adjusted palbo beta=-0.0004 (p=0.86). Treatment effect is essentially zero outside the subgroup, confirming the complete responder definition.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Olaparib has no measurable PFS benefit in BRCA-mutated patients (no signal even unadjusted in the sample once basic prognostics are controlled).
Pembrolizumab has no measurable PFS benefit in TNBC patients in adjusted analysis.

analyses.result_summary: Olaparib in BRCA1/2+ (n=2499): beta=-0.005 p=0.95. The unadjusted +0.35 difference disappears after adjustment for prognostic factors.
Pembrolizumab in TNBC (n=10496): beta=+0.008 p=0.13. Pembro x TNBC interaction p=0.35. No real benefit.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Trastuzumab provides no detectable benefit in HER2+ patients in this dataset.

analyses.result_summary: Trastuzumab in HER2+ (n=9060): beta=+0.001 p=0.83. Trastuzumab x HER2+ interaction p=0.50. No benefit.

proposed_hypotheses.text: ECOG performance status, stage_iv and brain mets exhibit additive (not multiplicative) prognostic effects on pfs_months.

analyses.code: OLS with ecog x stage_iv x brain_mets interactions
analyses.result_summary: Main effects: ecog -1.17/level, stage_iv -1.55, brain_mets -0.98 (each p≈0). Two- and three-way interactions among these have p>0.05 in adjusted models. Effects appear additive.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The dominant treatment-effect heterogeneity in this cohort is the palbociclib effect, which is concentrated in ER+/HER2-/PIK3CA-wt/ki67<15 patients (≈+4.7 month PFS benefit).
The secondary treatment-effect heterogeneity is the sacituzumab govitecan effect in patients with brain metastases (+0.24 month PFS benefit, smaller magnitude but reproducible).

analyses.code: Final adjusted OLS in subgroup vs complement
analyses.result_summary: Palbociclib in subgroup ER+/HER2-/PIK3CA-wt/ki67<15: adjusted beta=+4.71 (p<1e-300). Complement: beta=-0.0004 (p=0.86). Effect is localized to subgroup.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS in subgroup vs complement
analyses.result_summary: Sacituzumab in brain mets: beta=+0.244 (p=5e-6). Outside brain mets: beta near zero. Effect localized to brain-mets subgroup.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Final best-supported treatment-effect subgroup hypothesis for palbociclib: in patients with er_positive=1 AND her2_positive=0 AND pik3ca_mutation=0 AND ki67_pct<15, palbociclib increases pfs_months by approximately +4.7 months relative to no-palbociclib (effectively zero benefit outside this subgroup).

Final best-supported treatment-effect subgroup hypothesis for sacituzumab govitecan: in patients with has_brain_mets=1, sacituzumab govitecan increases pfs_months by approximately +0.24 months relative to no-sacituzumab (no benefit outside this subgroup).
Tamoxifen, trastuzumab, olaparib, and pembrolizumab show no detectable PFS benefit in this cohort, including within their canonical molecular subgroups (ER+, HER2+, BRCA-mut, TNBC respectively).

analyses.code: Final adjusted OLS in palbo subgroup
analyses.result_summary: Palbociclib in ER+/HER2-/PIK3CA-wt/ki67<15 (n=11490, palbo n=4070): adjusted beta=+4.71 mo, p<1e-300. Mean PFS palbo 8.97 vs control 4.29 (raw difference +4.69). Confirmed responder subgroup.

analyses.code: Final adjusted OLS in brain-mets subgroup
analyses.result_summary: Sacituzumab in has_brain_mets=1 (n=5090, sac n=490): adjusted beta=+0.244 mo, p=5.2e-6. Confirmed responder subgroup.
Trastuzumab/HER2+: beta=+0.001 p=0.83. Olaparib/BRCA+: beta=-0.005 p=0.95. Pembro/TNBC: beta=+0.008 p=0.13. Tamoxifen/ER+: beta=+0.003 p=0.83. All null in canonical and global analyses.
